race.comment: MORISU OJO (3) ran in the VRC Oaks last spring and resumed with a second over 1625m at Werribee, beaten one length. Her best form puts her right in this. PARVATI PARTY (7) peaked on her run when resuming last start over 1625m at Werribee, winding up in fifth. Steps up in journey this time. Usually performs well with that run under her belt, so is among the winning hopes. VIVID BLOOMS (10) had a bit on her rivals last time out, scoring an impressive 2.75 lengths maiden win over 1894m at Kyneton. Re-unites with Will Gordon who was on board last start. Tougher assignment this time but is one of the main contenders. HOLLY'S STAR (5) settled well back then came home powerfully to score by 0.8 lengths over 2000m at Albury last time out. Will be doing her best work late and a big chance to go back-to-back. IT'S ALL CALM (6) was woeful last start but good in 62 grade the start prior after a maiden win, so worthy of another chance.
